name: PathPilot — Error Notification
description: Triggered automatically by n8n when any PathPilot workflow fails. Emails aikomofisayo@gmail.com with the failing workflow name, execution ID, error message, and a direct link to the execution log. Also writes workflow.error to audit_logs. Set this as the Error Workflow in each PathPilot workflow's Settings panel.

parameters.subject: ={{ "PathPilot ERROR — " + $json.workflow.name }}
parameters.message:
=

PathPilot Workflow Error

Workflow: {{ $json.workflow.name }}

Execution ID: {{ $json.execution.id }}

Error: {{ $json.execution.error.message }}

View execution: {{ $json.execution.url }}

This is an automated alert from PathPilot. No customer data was exposed. Check the execution log to diagnose and retry if needed.

value.metadata: ={{ JSON.stringify({ workflow_name: $('On Workflow Error').item.json.workflow.name, execution_id: $('On Workflow Error').item.json.execution.id, error_message: $('On Workflow Error').item.json.execution.error.message }) }}
